    B

    begin() - Method in class edu.iu.transaction.IuTransactionManager
     

    C

    clearThreadState() - Method in class edu.iu.transaction.IuTransactionManager
    Clears the transaction state from the current thread, as a final safeguard, to be invoked after all transaction resources should have been released, and before returning the thread for reuse.
    close() - Method in class edu.iu.transaction.IuTransactionManager

    Provides the string representation of a transaction status code.

    Provides the string representation of an XA error code.

    I

    isCompleted() - Method in class edu.iu.transaction.IuTransaction
    Determines whether or not the transaction is a completed status.
    iu.util.transaction - module iu.util.transaction
    Virtual X/A Open compliant Jakarta Transactions implementation.
    IuTransaction - Class in edu.iu.transaction
    Portable Transaction implementation.
    IuTransaction(IuTransaction, ScheduledThreadPoolExecutor) - Constructor for class edu.iu.transaction.IuTransaction
    Creates a new branch transaction.
    IuTransaction(Duration, ScheduledThreadPoolExecutor) - Constructor for class edu.iu.transaction.IuTransaction
    Creates a new root transaction.
    IuTransaction(Duration, Consumer, ScheduledThreadPoolExecutor) - Constructor for class edu.iu.transaction.IuTransaction
    Creates a new root transaction.
    IuTransactionManager - Class in edu.iu.transaction
    Portable virtual transaction manager implementation.
    IuTransactionManager() - Constructor for class edu.iu.transaction.IuTransactionManager
    Default constructor.
    IuXid - Class in edu.iu.transaction
    Portable Xid implementation.
    IuXid() - Constructor for class edu.iu.transaction.IuXid
    Creates a new root transaction identifier.
    IuXid(IuXid) - Constructor for class edu.iu.transaction.IuXid
    Creates a new branch transaction identifier.

    Joins two transaction branches.
